channel.title: Progress Reports on Lily Wasko
channel.description: Recent content in Progress Reports on Lily Wasko

item.title: Progress Report 01 - 10/25/2021
item.description: Slight update to research plan based on research paper N-qubit quantum teleportation, information splitting and superdense coding through the composite GHZ–Bell channel by Debashis Saha and Prasanta K. Panigrahi: Since N+1 qubits must be acted on in order to encode 2N + 1 classical bits, the pure GHZ 5 state is useless for superdense coding, and is being abandoned for the secure communication demo in favor of the composite GHZ-Bell state outlined in the research above.
